hypothesis: Add price drop flag features: binary indicator for whether sell_price dropped vs 7 days ago and vs 28 days ago. Price drops are strong purchase drivers. Uses fast vectorized shift operations (no groupby rolling). Previous fast price drop attempt (exp_0059) scored WRMSSE=0.94461, slightly better than best (exp_0044=0.94391). This run uses the same feature set as exp_0059 but also adds days_since_release from exp_0063 (WRMSSE=0.95290 alone). Combining both new features together to check if they complement each other.
